What we know so far: Supreme Leader's compound hit and Iran's retaliatory strikesIran has retaliated with a missile barrage towards Israel, while explosions have been heard in Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait and the UAE. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2dyz6p3weo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2dyz6p3weo#1 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 20:06:48 GMT
Luxury Dubai hotel hit as Iran launches retaliatory strikes across regionSmoke and flames rose from Dubai's Fairmont The Palm hotel as civilian targets came under fire along with the US military bases across the middle east. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c204px4zddro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c204px4zddro#1 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 18:15:02 GMT
US and Israeli strikes on Iran in mapsIsrael and the US have launched strikes across Iran, with Iran retaliating with strikes across the region. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo#1 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 18:09:59 GMT
Iran retaliation raises questions about US air defencesIran's strike on US Navy base in Bahrain will worry Washington and its allies in the region. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cg5nm6v2p4no?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cg5nm6v2p4no#1 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 19:34:00 GMT
Bowen: A dangerous moment, but US and Israel see opportunity not to be missedIsrael and the US believe Iran's regime is vulnerable, dealing with an economic crisis and the aftermath of protests. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn0z9012291o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn0z9012291o#1 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 12:17:17 GMT
UK planes 'in the sky' in Middle East as part of defensive operation, PM saysSir Keir Starmer says protections for British bases and personnel have been stepped up to their highest level. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c20l1v0ldqzo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c20l1v0ldqzo#2 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 19:17:11 GMT
Flights cancelled as travel warnings issued after strikes on IranBA, Virgin Atlantic and Wizz Air are among major airlines to overhaul their schedules in light of the attacks. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0rjpr575g9o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0rjpr575g9o#2 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 20:23:09 GMT

Minister Josh Simons resigns after Labour Together claimsSimons faced claims the think tank he used to run commissioned a report which looked into the background of journalists. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cq6q0l9e7plo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cq6q0l9e7plo#2 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 20:14:44 GMT

Burnham would probably have won by-election, Labour deputy leader saysLucy Powell tells the BBC that Labour needs to make more use of the Greater Manchester mayor. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cde46np2nklo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cde46np2nklo#2 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 17:10:37 GMT
